description.value:
Send Medication prescription script2-extraVV building blocks for patient M. van XXX_Noordman
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: KWAL script 2 extraVV Kwalificatie script 2 - Extra VV: medicatievoorschrift met een bestaande MA waarvoor een extra VV is aangemaakt.
Send Medication prescription script2-extraVV resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '7323') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '20303') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '7323') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '20303') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '7323|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (ACENOCOUMAROL TABLET 1MG)
